title: Chapter 30
content:
Chapter 30: Chapter 30: Azure Orb Treasury

Within the Azure Dragon Sect exists one building that has everything from valuable resources to expensive treasures.

Medicines, spirit stones, weapons – all that could be obtained at the Azure Orb Treasury as long as one has enough Sect Points.

Sect Points are a kind of currency that only has value within the Azure Dragon Sect.

With Sect Points, one can exchange them for anything within the Azure Orb Treasury.

Sect Points can be obtained through the sect by doing meritorious deeds for the sect, or by doing missions; they can also be traded with others like a real currency.

But with his golden token, he doesn’t need Sect Point. Arriving at Azure Orb Treasury, he greeted the elder behind the desk.

"Greetings, Elder," as he bowed toward the elder.

"What do you need? You came to get your monthly supply? or trade point for treasure?" the elder said without looking at Damon.

Instead of answering Damon, just shove the golden token to the elder. Not hearing the response he wanted, he turned around and saw the golden token on his desk.

"Ohh, you must be Damon, the new golden token holder." He suddenly changed his attitude.

"The golden token can get you anything, as it’s for the Elementary Spirit Realm and True Spirit Realm. Its purpose is to make the promising recruit become an inner disciple faster." The elder explained to him.

"Huh? Why only the Elementary Spirit Realm and True Spirit Realm?"

"It’s to prevent exploitation. If there are no restrictions, the disciple can just rob the treasury empty and sell it."

"I see, then can I see the list of pills that I can get?"

The elder gave him the list of pills and treasure to Damon. He sees a lot of pills and spiritual herbs that can boost cultivation and even spiritual roots. Advancement Pill for Earth Grade, but all of them are only Elementary Grade, High purity.

He now realizes that the flawless pill that he bought in the t=store actually a rare item. Then he decides what he will get.

"Elder, I request the Elementary Spirit Gathering pill and the Earth Spirit Gathering pill. Also, I want Spirit Grade Sword and some spirit stones."

"You want to go out of the sect?" The elder asks him.

"Yes, elder, I’m planning to take a mission and gain experience."

"Good, good, a good cultivator not only sits and cultivates all day, but they need fighting experience to be a better cultivator," as the elder tapped Damon’s shoulder and turned around to get his things.

After a few minutes, the elder came back he give him a ring.

"The sword and spirit stone are inside the storage ring. And for your gathering pills, it will be sent to your villa today. Since you plan to go out, I also put some recovery pills for you."

"Ahh, elder, do you have paper and a brush? I want to write something."

The elder gave him the paper and brush. Damon wrote a note for Ariel to use the pill for her cultivation, and he gave it to the elder.

"Elder, please give this while sending my pills to my villa; someone is waiting there."

"Sure, I will give this to the disciple who will send you a resource."

"Thank you, elder." Damon bowed to the elder and left the treasury.

Outside the treasury, Damon wore the storage ring and checked it. Inside, there are a few dozen spirit stones, a dozen pills, and a sword. Damon summons the spirit-grade weapon.

A sword pops out, then he sees something new.

[Spirit Steel sword]

[Description: The highest quality mass-produced Spirit Grade Sword that can channel qi better that regular sword.]

[Spirit Grade Weapon - Peak]

’Ohh, is this the Incubus Celestial Eyes ability? I can see the item description now. It’s like an appraisal in-game, huh...’

’Well... that’s good, now I can see the item detail even though I never saw it before.’

Satisfied with his new ability, he put the spirit sword back in his storage ring along with his wooden sword.

Damon then headed toward the Mission Hall.

The Mission Hall was a building where disciples and elders alike went to request missions given to the sect by the outside world.

These missions are very important to the sect as they improve the sect’s reputation within the cultivation world and gain more trust from those who gave them the missions in the first place.

Inside the Mission Hall, there were many disciples walking around while looking at the hundreds of scrolls that were pinned to the wall.

The missions were all organized into different sections depending on the contents of the mission.

For example, missions that required hunting would be in the hunting section, and missions that required disciples to do trivial matters, such as cleaning, would be in the miscellaneous section.

Damon casually walked up and found a familiar figure.

Mio and Mia stood in front of the hunting section, looking at the wall, looking at the mission.

Thinking about what happened yesterday, and because they peeked at him while he had sex with Ariel, they are probably going to run away in embarrassment if they meet him.

So, Damon decided to surprise them to prevent them from running away and activated his newly acquired technique, the Eternal Darkness’s Broken Shadow Art.

Damon began disappearing as darkness slowly cloaked him and his aura got fainter until it disappeared completely.

He walks casually toward the twins, and he notices nobody can see or even feel him as he passes multiple disciples.

’Wow, this technique really does what it says. With this, I can even sneak into a woman’s bathroom, hehehe.’

’But still, I don’t know the limit of this technique but someone above the Heavenly Spirit Realm probably can break through this technique.’

’Anyway, let’s surprise them.’

Damon walked until he reached the twin back. Seeing the twin from the back, he started appreciating their curvaceous, enticing backsides pressed tightly against their garments.

Finish admiring their butt, he wrapped his arms around their waist and deactivated the technique.

"Hello, my beautiful senior sisters."

Suddenly feeling arms wrapped around their waist and hear a voice, both of them can’t help but yelp.

"Kyaa~!!!"
